de: Amendment to the Administration Agreement between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Development Association concerning the Multi-Donor Trust Fund for Capacity Building in Public Financial Management in the Kyrgyz Republic (TF No. TF071328)  - 14-03-2014 - Abkommen zwischen der Schweiz, vertreten durch das SECO, und der IBRD und der "International Development Association" betreffend des Multi-Donor Trust Fund for Capacity Building in Public Financial Management in der Republik Kirgisistan (TF No. TF071328)
en: Amendment to the Administration Agreement between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Development Association concerning the Multi-Donor Trust Fund for Capacity Building in Public Financial Management in the Kyrgyz Republic (TF No. TF071328)  - 14-03-2014 - Trust Fund Administration Agreement between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Development Association concerning the Multi-Donor Trust Fund for Capacity Building in Public Financial Management in the Kyrgyz Republic (TF No. TF071328)
fr: Amendment to the Administration Agreement between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Development Association concerning the Multi-Donor Trust Fund for Capacity Building in Public Financial Management in the Kyrgyz Republic (TF No. TF071328)  - 14-03-2014 - Accord entre la Suisse, représentée par le SECO, et la BIRD et la "International Development Association" concernant le Multi-Donor Trust Fund for Capacity Building in Public Financial Management à la République kirghize (TF No. TF071328)
